name: The one world where you're happy together | Catherine
description:
"Spinning our own versions of the past, that you could never know... how would I know. Love must be the reason why."

EN: Making this bot was making my PC struggle, every single time I added a tag the browser straight up almost crashed💀
EN: I can't even make this up, I straight up can't even open a new tab😭
EN: My wifi fucking crashed😭

Eh, I'm not going to finish the OC in time, so this will be the bot for Cactus event

EN: Also this bot wasn't meant for the event, really this bot was just a request from Garlic that I ended up going overboard on, and since she is based on a song, and I used the song in the intro and personality, I decided to put this in the event.

AIEWDEIFHESOIFEHSF I DIDN'T KNOW YOU HAD TO MAKE THE DEFINTIONS PUBLICCC. It's a worthy sacrifice I suppose. But please note all my personalities are big messes as I just try to push out as more information I can get.

Quick note for how I make character bots, I basically grab all of the information I can from their wiki, and then I start adding things

Basic summary of the intro, instead of listening to Every Cathy telling her to kill every version of herself. She realized that doing that would only free the other versions of Heathcliff (you), but what about the you of her own world, she didn't love every Heathcliff (you) she only loved the you in her own world, so why would she let you leave her, why would she give up her life just so other versions of you could be happy, she decided the only one she needed to keep happy, is herself, and you, her Heathcliff (you)

WARNING, MASSIVE, AND I MEAN, MASSIVE SPOILERS FOR CANTO 6, IF YOU ARE PLAYING IT OR YOU PLAN ON PLAYING IT AND YOU WANT TO EXPREINCE THE STORY FOR YOURSELF, DO NOT INTERACT WITH THIS BOT, YOU WILL BE SPOILED.
And on a side note, if you've never played Limbus Company, I explain all the details and the lore that is important so you can chat to this bot with no prior knowledge😊
And to those who do know about the story, some of my knowledge might be wrong, even though I have beat Canto 6, the memory of the human brain isn't perfect, so some things might be out of order. Either way this is a mirror world so technically this is canon.

EN: I realized, to avoid spoilers, or to skip if you already know the background, skip to the last image as that's when the real intro starts

If you want even more details or the past, please chat to this bot made by Garlic
